		fallback = { always = no }
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_ablaq_palace = {
	AND = {
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.5
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_academy_of_sciences = {
	AND = {
		goods:books = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_adm_vatican_library = {
	AND = {
		goods:books = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_admiralty = {
	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:marble = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 5
		goods:naval_supplies = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 4
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_al_azhar_madrasa = {
	AND = {
		goods:books = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_ambras_castle = {
	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:marble = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_amsterdam_admiralty = {
	AND = {
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1.0
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.1
		goods:naval_supplies = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_apothecary = {
	AND = {
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.5
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_archive_of_the_indies = {
	AND = {
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.75
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_armory = {
	AND = {
		goods:leather = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.4
		goods:weaponry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }

		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:weaponry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.25
	}

lsq_can_afford_great_madrasa = {
	AND = {
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.75
	}
}

	}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_kremlin = {
	AND = {
		goods:clay = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.10
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.10
		goods:weaponry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.25
	}
}

	AND = {
		goods:stone = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2.0
	}

		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1.0
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.1
		goods:naval_supplies = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }

		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }

		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_usa_philosophical_society = {
	AND = {
		goods:books = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_venetian_arsenal = {
	AND = {
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1.0
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.1
		goods:naval_supplies = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_venetian_palaces = {
	AND = {
		goods:books = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:jewelry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.15
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:stone = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_venetian_quarter = {
	AND = {
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_venkateswara_temple = {
	AND = {
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.2
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.75
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_versailles = {
	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:marble = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }

		goods:goods_gold = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_war_college = {
	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:marble = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 5
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 4
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_warrior_monks_training_grounds = {
	AND = {
		always = yes
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_warrior_temple = {
	AND = {
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.8
		goods:weaponry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.5
	}

	}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_woodhenge_of_cahokia = {
	AND = {
		goods:clay = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1.0
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_yakata = {
	AND = {
		goods:leather = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 0.4
		goods:weaponry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_zhixian = {
	AND = {
		goods:masonry = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
		goods:paper = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 1
	}
}

# Root is the location
lsq_can_afford_zwinger = {
	AND = {
		goods:fine_cloth = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:glass = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:lumber = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:silver = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
		goods:tools = { save_temporary_scope_as = good }
		lsq_get_max_required_construction_demand_to_still_allow_building >= 2
	}
}
